summary: Phase 2: Large file splitting completed. 5 tasks executed in order 2.2, 2.1, 2.4, 2.3, 2.5.

tasks.description: Move isValidWorktreeId from auto-yes-manager.ts to path-validator.ts
tasks.notes: isValidWorktreeId and WORKTREE_ID_PATTERN moved to path-validator.ts. All 12 API route files and test files updated to import from new location. auto-yes-manager.ts imports from path-validator internally.

tasks.description: Extract getAnswerInput from prompt-detector.ts to prompt-answer-input.ts
tasks.notes: getAnswerInput (48 lines) extracted. prompt-detector.ts re-exports via 'export { getAnswerInput } from ./prompt-answer-input'. Reduced prompt-detector.ts from 965 to 926 lines.

tasks.description: Split claude-session.ts: extract key-sending to session-key-sender.ts
tasks.notes: Extracted sanitizeSessionEnvironment, waitForPrompt, sendMessageToSession, stopSession (207 lines). claude-session.ts delegates to session-key-sender.ts internally. One-way dependency: session-key-sender.ts -> tmux.ts. claude-session.ts reduced from 838 to 737 lines.

tasks.description: Split auto-yes-manager.ts into auto-yes-state.ts + auto-yes-poller.ts + barrel
tasks.notes: auto-yes-manager.ts (853 lines) split into: auto-yes-state.ts (342 lines, state management + stop conditions + constants), auto-yes-poller.ts (558 lines, polling logic), auto-yes-manager.ts (56 lines, barrel with explicit named re-exports). checkStopCondition uses callback parameter to avoid circular dependency with stopAutoYesPolling. auto-yes/route.ts isValidWorktreeId import fixed to path-validator.

7 memo sub-components (WorktreeInfoFields, DesktopHeader, InfoModal, LoadingIndicator, ErrorDisplay, MobileInfoContent, MobileContent), useDescriptionEditor hook, and helper functions (deriveWorktreeStatus, parseMessageTimestamps) extracted to WorktreeDetailSubComponents.tsx (909 lines). Main file reduced from 2709 to 1839 lines (32% reduction).
